proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab=1 have a higher objective_response rate than patients with treatment_pembrolizumab=0, in the full unstratified cohort.
Patients receiving treatment_sotorasib=1 have a higher objective_response rate than patients with treatment_sotorasib=0, in the full unstratified cohort.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib=1 have a higher objective_response rate than patients with treatment_olaparib=0, in the full unstratified cohort.
Patients receiving treatment_osimertinib=1 have a higher objective_response rate than patients with treatment_osimertinib=0, in the full unstratified cohort.

analyses.result_summary: Response rate 0.174 on treatment_pembrolizumab vs 0.164 off; risk diff +0.0099, p=0.00341.
Response rate 0.169 on treatment_sotorasib vs 0.169 off; risk diff +0.0008, p=0.829.
Response rate 0.170 on treatment_olaparib vs 0.169 off; risk diff +0.0013, p=0.724.
Response rate 0.165 on treatment_osimertinib vs 0.170 off; risk diff -0.0050, p=0.179.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a positive interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and tmb_high on objective_response: the response benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab=1 vs treatment_pembrolizumab=0 is larger in patients with tmb_high=1 than with tmb_high=0.

There is a positive interaction between treatment_sotorasib and kras_g12c on objective_response: the response benefit of treatment_sotorasib=1 vs treatment_sotorasib=0 is larger in patients with kras_g12c=1 than with kras_g12c=0.

There is a positive interaction between treatment_olaparib and brca2_mutation on objective_response: the response benefit of treatment_olaparib=1 vs treatment_olaparib=0 is larger in patients with brca2_mutation=1 than with brca2_mutation=0.

There is a positive interaction between treatment_osimertinib and egfr_mutation on objective_response: the response benefit of treatment_osimertinib=1 vs treatment_osimertinib=0 is larger in patients with egfr_mutation=1 than with egfr_mutation=0.
Older age_years is associated with lower objective_response rate.
Female sex (sex_female=1) is associated with higher objective_response than male.
Higher smoking_pack_years is associated with lower objective_response.

analyses.result_summary: log-OR per year of age = +0.0005, p=0.668.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps is associated with lower objective_response rate.
stage_iv=1 is associated with lower objective_response than stage_iv=0.
has_brain_mets=1 is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with higher objective_response.
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher nlr is associated with lower objective_response.
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with higher objective_response.
Higher pdl1_tps is associated with higher objective_response in the full cohort.

There is a positive interaction between pdl1_tps and treatment_pembrolizumab: the per-unit increase in objective_response with rising pdl1_tps is larger among patients on treatment_pembrolizumab than off.
stk11_mutation=1 is associated with lower objective_response in the full cohort.
There is a negative interaction between stk11_mutation and treatment_pembrolizumab: the response benefit of pembrolizumab is smaller (or reversed) in stk11_mutation=1 than in stk11_mutation=0.
keap1_mutation=1 is associated with lower objective_response in the full cohort.
Objective_response rate differs across histology categories (adenocarcinoma, squamous) in the full cohort.
The response benefit of treatment_pembrolizumab over no pembrolizumab is different (interaction) between squamous and adenocarcinoma histology.

Within the pdl1_lt5 stratum (pdl1_tps band), treatment_pembrolizumab=1 is associated with higher objective_response than treatment_pembrolizumab=0.
Within the pdl1_5_50 stratum (pdl1_tps band), treatment_pembrolizumab=1 is associated with higher objective_response than treatment_pembrolizumab=0.

Within kras_g12c=1 (n=6368), treatment_sotorasib=1 vs treatment_sotorasib=0 increases objective_response.
Within kras_g12c=0 (n=43632), treatment_sotorasib=1 vs treatment_sotorasib=0 does not increase objective_response (i.e., effect estimate ≈ 0).
Within egfr_mutation=1 (n=6517), treatment_osimertinib=1 vs treatment_osimertinib=0 increases objective_response.
Within egfr_mutation=0 (n=43483), treatment_osimertinib=1 vs treatment_osimertinib=0 does not increase objective_response (i.e., effect estimate ≈ 0).
Within brca2_mutation=1 (n=1519), treatment_olaparib=1 vs treatment_olaparib=0 increases objective_response.
Within brca2_mutation=0 (n=48481), treatment_olaparib=1 vs treatment_olaparib=0 does not increase objective_response (i.e., effect estimate ≈ 0).
Within stk11_mutation=0 subgroup, treatment_pembrolizumab=1 vs 0 effect on objective_response is positive.
Within stk11_mutation=1 subgroup, treatment_pembrolizumab=1 vs 0 effect on objective_response is attenuated/absent.

analyses.code: chi2 stk11_mutation=0: pembro vs no pembro
chi2 stk11_mutation=1: pembro vs no pembro

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among tmb_high=1 patients, the positive pembrolizumab-response association is attenuated in stk11_mutation=1 vs stk11_mutation=0 (negative three-way modification).
Within stk11_mutation=0 AND tmb_high=1 patients, treatment_pembrolizumab=1 is associated with higher objective_response than =0.

analyses.code: chi2 obj x pembro within stk11=0 & tmb_high=1

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a negative interaction between liver_mets and treatment_pembrolizumab on objective_response: pembrolizumab benefit is smaller in liver_mets=1 than =0.
There is a negative interaction between has_brain_mets and treatment_pembrolizumab on objective_response.
There is a positive interaction between smoking_pack_years and treatment_pembrolizumab on objective_response (heavy smokers benefit more).
Smoking_status differs across egfr_mutation strata such that egfr_mutation=1 patients have lower mean smoking_pack_years.
As a block, the 23 SNP variables jointly predict objective_response (likelihood-ratio test against intercept-only model).
In a model with treatment_pembrolizumab × tmb_high and treatment_pembrolizumab × pdl1_tps interactions, both interactions are positive (each independently increases pembrolizumab benefit).

analyses.code: LR test full SNP block vs null
